seo.title: About Joshua Tree Health | Formerly Simply Teens | Apex, NC
seo.description: Joshua Tree Health, formerly Simply Teens Outpatient, provides PHP and IOP care for adolescents ages 10–17 in Apex, North Carolina.

hero.title: A name for the conditions that make growth
hero.sub: We built this program to offer steadiness through a hard stretch of adolescence, with clinical structure and a defined place for families.

facts.title: Formerly Simply Teens
facts.body: Continuing care in the Apex community

mission.title: Why we're called Joshua Tree
mission.lead: The Joshua tree survives difficult conditions without following a blueprint. Its form records what it has adapted to.
paragraphs: We do not ask teens to become Joshua trees. The name is a reminder that development responds to conditions. Change the conditions, and something different may become possible.

Our job is to provide those conditions: a reliable week, concrete skills, clinical attention, and family participation. Joshua Tree Health offers PHP and IOP for adolescents ages 10–17 in Apex, North Carolina.

founder.name: Gabriela Forter
founder.description: Gabriela Forter leads Joshua Tree Health’s work with adolescents and families in Apex, North Carolina.

history.title: Simply Teens is now Joshua Tree Health.
paragraphs: Joshua Tree Health was formerly known as Simply Teens Outpatient, a program that served adolescents and families in Apex, North Carolina for years.
In 2026, Simply Teens began a new chapter under new leadership, with an expanded clinical model and a new name. The name reflects where the program is going.
If you were a patient or family of Simply Teens Outpatient, you’re in the right place. We’re glad you found us.

values.title: The values have to show up in the room.

items.name: Evidence first
items.body: We build our programs around what clinical research shows works for adolescents, and we update how we practice as the evidence grows.

items.name: Family at the center
items.body: Teens don’t develop in isolation. Family involvement is built into the work because the relationships around a teen matter as much as what happens in the room.

items.name: A direction of their own
items.body: We help each teen build capacity and a clearer direction that fits who they are.

items.name: Structured care, lasting skills
items.body: Structure is what makes the work possible. Consistent programming gives teens something to count on, and skills they carry beyond the program.

programFacts.title: Clear information before care begins.
programFacts.intro: Before you make any decision, admissions will walk you through the assessment, the current program schedule, and how insurance verification works.

items.label: Where
items.detail: 800 West Williams St, STE 203 · Apex, NC

items.label: How families participate
items.detail: Family involvement is discussed during assessment and treatment planning

closing.title: Clinical seriousness and warmth belong in the same room.
closing.body: Tell us what your family is dealing with. We’ll help you figure out whether Joshua Tree Health is the right level of care.
